title: Vesuvague tree

The '''Vesuvague tree''', also known as the '''Vesuvague Hanging Tree''', was a [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]], [[Sentience/Legends|semi-sentient]], red-barked [[Tree/Legends|tree]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. It was one of a number of intelligent plants from the world, a category of which included the [[Bafforr tree]].

The vesuvague tree, though rooted in the earth, was able to detect and move itself towards motion by sensing air vibrations in its leaves and ground vibrations in its roots. In order to catch its prey, it used its quickly growing vines and roots, capable of extending multiple [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in mere seconds, to seize, strangle, and crush its food. Once a creature was [[Death/Legends|dead]], the tree would bury its vines and roots inside of its prey, and slowly feed off of its bodily fluids.

The tree could be trained to respond to simple commands, much like a pet, and could understand words by using its leaves to sense the vibrations and patterns of spoken [[Language/Legends|languages]].

Predatory vesuvague trees were kept at the south end of [[Gardulla's pleasure garden|Gardulla the Hutt's pleasure garden]] within her [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] [[Gardulla the Hutt's Palace/Legends|palace]], located near the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]]. The garden's many denizens and forced tourists would observe, not without horror, how the tree's limbs would suddenly drop and attempt to strangle, more often successfully than not, unwary passersby—captive beings that [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] constrained to enter the garden for her own and others' perverse entertainment.<ref name="Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne">''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]''</ref>

[[Momaw Nadon/Legends|Momaw Nadon]] planted a vesuvague tree in his garden in the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Momaw Nadon's house|home]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It acted as a watchdog for the site, and its reputation warded off [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and local [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police]]. The grove also concealed a secret chamber for hiding local [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]].
